reference: Hello, I have a bad burning sensation on the upper right side of my stomach. It feels like my flesh is burning and it covers an area about the size of a silver dollar. Sometimes, when I bend over to tie my shoes, it goes into a spasm. The burning sensation is constant now, and it gets a lot worse with certain foods.
text: Here we are. I have a bad burning sensation on the upper right side of my stomach. There's no such thing as burning when it covers an area about the size of a burger dollar. Sometimes, when I bend over to kind of squeeze, it doesn't hit my stomach. The burning sensation is sparsely, and it gets a lot worse at certain speeds.
